description.value: Aura varies; CL varies; Slot none; Price 420 gp (Conformity), 2,820 gp (Hobbling), 10,020 gp (Lesser Geas), 14,420 gp (Subjugation), 14,420 gp (Tracking), 18,020 gp (Justice), 26,420 gp (Geas); Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION Each of these 3-foot-long branding irons ends in a distinctive, cruel-looking symbol. Once per day on command, a wielder of a conquering brand can cause the tip to grow red hot for 1 hour, and during this time one creature can be branded. The brand’s recipient is burned as normal for a branding iron and is also affected as per brand or another spell the conquering brand carries, as the wielder of the brand chooses. A conquering brand can create only one magical brand per day. Conformity: A conquering brand of conformity can create a brand of conformity. Aura faint transmutation; CL 1st; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, brand of conformity. Geas: A conquering brand of geas can affect the recipient as per geas/quest. When the brand is used in this way, it takes 10 minutes for its tip to heat up. If not used to create a brand, the mark left by the branding iron is non-magical and not tied to the spell effect, so removing it doesn’t remove the spell effect. Aura moderate enchantment; CL 11th; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, geas/quest. Hobbling: A conquering brand of hobbling can create a brand of hobbling. faint transmutation; CL 4th; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, brand of hobbling. Justice: A conquering brand of justice can create a mark of justice, as per the spell. When the brand is used this way, it takes 10 minutes for its tip to heat up. Aura faint necromancy; CL 9th; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, mark of justice. Lesser Geas: A conquering brand of lesser geas allows you to affect the recipient as per lesser geas. When the brand is used in this way, it takes 1 round for its tip to heat up. If not used to create a brand, the mark left by the branding iron is non-magical and not tied to the spell effect, so removing it doesn’t remove the spell effect. Aura faint enchantment; CL 7th; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, lesser geas. Subjugation: This brand can create a greater brand, except it blazes when brought within 30 feet of the Nail’s symbol. Aura moderate transmutation; CL 10th; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, greater brand. Tracking: A conquering brand of tracking can create a brand of tracking. Aura moderate transmutation; CL 9th; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, brand of tracking. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells brand, additional spells (see text); Cost 220 gp (Conformity), 13,220 gp (Geas), 1,420 gp (Hobbling), 9,020 gp (Justice), 5,020 gp (Lesser Geas), 7,220 gp (Subjugation), 7,220 gp (Tracking)
